name: strafes-site
description: Open-source StrafesNET browser and WebGPU replay viewer

scripts.dev: NODE_ENV=development concurrently -n "SHARED,FRONTEND,BACKEND" -c "green,red,blue" -p "[{name}]" "npm run dev:shared" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.build:frontend: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace client
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace client && npm run build --workspace server
scripts.lint: npm exec --workspace client eslint -- src --ignore-pattern '**/*.d.ts' && npm exec --workspace server eslint -- src && npm exec --workspace shared eslint -- src
